# Kaunteya Arjun (Somya Prasad Sethy)

> CyberSecurity Researcher & Full Stack Engineer from Cuttack, Odisha, India.

Kaunteya Arjun, also known as Somya Prasad Sethy (online handle: Kaunteyaarjun), is a CyberSecurity Researcher and Full Stack Engineer focused on building resilient, scalable systems. He specializes in merging high-performance backend logic with intuitive frontend design.

## Identity

- **Full Name**: Somya Prasad Sethy
- **Known As**: Kaunteya Arjun, Kaunteyaarjun, Kaunteya, Somya
- **Title**: CyberSecurity Researcher & Full Stack Engineer
- **Location**: Cuttack, Odisha, India

- **Email**: teams@polestudios.in

## Expertise

- CyberSecurity Research & Penetration Testing
- Full Stack Web Development (Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js)
- High-Performance UI Design with GSAP & Framer Motion
- Branding & Digital Product Strategy
- Scalable Backend Architecture & API Design
- Web Application Security

## Professional Background

### Founder & Branding Consultant — Pole Studios (Oct 2025 – Present)
Founded and operates a branding and web development studio delivering commercial websites and digital products. Developed a streamlined requirements-gathering process that reduced project delivery time by 15%.

### Web Developer (Next.js) — Freelance (Jul 2023 – Oct 2025)
Engineered and deployed immersive Next.js applications for various clients, consistently exceeding performance benchmarks. Recognised for cinematic UI design, GSAP animations, and smooth full-stack architecture.

### Video Editor — Freelance (Jan 2023 – Oct 2025)
Collaborated with content creators on documentary and short-form video projects. Created dynamic motion graphics and tracked engagement metrics to optimise viewer retention.

## Projects

### Pole Studios (https://polestudios.in)
Full-service branding and web development agency. High-performance, cinematic web experiences combining cutting-edge technology with premium design aesthetics. Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and GSAP.

### DMS Photography (https://dmsphotography.in)
High-end photography portfolio with immersive gallery experience and cinematic presentation. Optimized delivery of hundreds of high-resolution images with custom masonry grid layouts. Built with Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

## Technology Stack

Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, Framer Motion, Figma, VS Code, Vercel, Sanity CMS, Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve
